pages.title: Bridger Western Wiki Homepage
pages.description: The definitive Bridger Western resource for Ridge B Valley. Master Stands, guns, Moola farming, and permadeath survival.

pages.title: Stands Database
pages.description: Complete database of all 18+ Stands in Bridger Western with acquisition methods and tier rankings.

pages.title: How to Get a Stand
pages.description: Arrow Shard fishing (0.5% drop rate), Corpse Part KOTH events, water escape tactics, and server selection strategies.

pages.title: Stand Abilities & Skills
pages.description: Complete moveset guide with all Stand skills, keybinds, special mechanics, and passive abilities.

pages.title: Stand Tier List
pages.description: Complete tier list ranking all Stands by PvP and PvE performance.

pages.title: Discord Coordination Guide
pages.description: Clan monopoly reality, team strategies, server flooding methods, and coordination success rates.

pages.title: Corpse Part Survival Guide
pages.description: KOTH mechanics, water escape tactics, probability systems, body part types, and advanced survival tips.

pages.title: Stands FAQ
pages.description: Common questions, mechanism explanations, troubleshooting guide, and beginner mistake prevention.

pages.title: The World
pages.description: Long timestop (~5 seconds). Top-tier combat Stand with devastating time manipulation.

pages.title: D4C
pages.description: Special obtainment: 100 kills, 10 killstreak, Deserts area. Dimensional manipulation Stand.

pages.title: Killer Queen
pages.description: Bomb abilities and Sheer Heart Attack. Powerful explosive combat Stand.

pages.title: Star Platinum
pages.description: Can evolve to SPTW (1% chance with timestop movement). Powerful melee Stand.

pages.title: Star Platinum The World
pages.description: Evolved form of Star Platinum with 2-second timestop and grab beatdown.

pages.title: King Crimson
pages.description: Time Erasure and Epitaph auto-dodge abilities. Time manipulation Stand.

pages.title: Gold Experience
pages.description: Life Giver abilities and healing support. Can summon creatures and heal.

pages.title: Gold Experience Requiem
pages.description: Requiem evolution of Gold Experience. Status pending.

pages.title: Crazy Diamond
pages.description: Restoration abilities and healing support. Can restore and heal.

pages.title: Tusk Acts 1-3
pages.description: Left Arm only. Cripple passive (cannot walk/use guns). Nail-based attacks.

pages.title: Hermit Purple
pages.description: Grapple and mobility utility Stand. Pull targets and mobility.

pages.title: Silver Chariot
pages.description: Armor removal for speed boost. Fast rapier combat Stand.

pages.title: Hierophant Green
pages.description: Emerald Splash and Stand Pilot abilities. Ranged combat Stand.

pages.title: Tubular Bells
pages.description: Balloon attacks with no stamina cost. Utility Stand.

pages.title: 20th Century Boy
pages.description: Absolute Defence that reflects attacks. Defensive utility Stand.

pages.title: Hey Ya
pages.description: Random buff provider utility Stand. Encouragement passive.

pages.title: Mandom
pages.description: Time Rewind (6 seconds) utility Stand. Rewind time for all players.

pages.title: Purple Haze
pages.description: Poison virus combat Stand. Status pending.

pages.title: Whitesnake
pages.description: Developer/admin only. Can permanently steal stands.

pages.title: KOTH Event Mechanics
pages.description: Complete KOTH event mechanics, spawn requirements, and timing windows.

pages.title: Probability Accumulation System
pages.description: How success probability increases with hold time. 15-20% max success rate.

pages.title: Body Part Distribution
pages.description: Different body parts correlate with different Stands. Left arm for Tusk.

pages.title: Water Escape Tactics
pages.description: Water escape method using horse for solo survival. Most reliable tactic.

pages.title: Discord Server Flooding
pages.description: How clans flood servers to monopolize Corpse Part events.

pages.title: Team Coordination Strategies
pages.description: Team roles, communication protocols, and coordination strategies.

pages.title: Weapons Database
pages.description: Complete weapon database with primary and secondary weapons, tier 3 dual wield system, and weapon mechanics.

pages.title: Tier 3 Requirement
pages.description: Cannot equip both primary and secondary weapons until reaching tier 3.

pages.title: Stand Penalty
pages.description: Having a Stand decreases base gun damages.

pages.title: Revolver Reloads
pages.description: Revolvers have wasteful reload mechanics.

pages.title: Primary Weapons
pages.description: All 9 primary weapons including revolvers, pistols, rifles, and bow with complete stats.

pages.title: Taurus .357
pages.description: Starting pistol. Mid range in all stats. Revolver with wasteful reload.

pages.title: Schofield 6
pages.description: Average in nearly every stat. Reloads fairly quick.

pages.title: Whitney Dragoon
pages.description: High damage, slow reloading revolver.

pages.title: Dual Derringers
pages.description: Low damage, high fire rate, fast reloading pistol.

pages.title: Mauser
pages.description: Low recoil, low damage, fairly high fire rate pistol.

pages.title: Winchester Repeater
pages.description: 8 bullet rifle with more range and high fire rate. Functions like an 8-bullet revolver.

pages.title: Bow
pages.description: Mid-range sniper. Right click to switch between Silver Arrows and Dynamite Arrows.

pages.title: Malcom .70
pages.description: 4-bullet scoped rifle with long range. Headshots deal 50 damage.

pages.title: Bolt Action Rifle
pages.description: Currently unobtainable. Will be remodeled in future update.

pages.title: Secondary Weapons
pages.description: All 6 secondary weapons. Requires Tier 3 to equip alongside primary weapon.

pages.title: Mares Leg
pages.description: 7 bullets, lower damage, faster version of Winchester Repeater.

pages.title: Sabre
pages.description: Melee weapon. Can parry other sabres and vampires.

pages.title: Colt Ocelot
pages.description: Higher damage revolver. Bullets ricochet 3 times.

pages.title: DB Shotgun
pages.description: Double barrel shotgun. Shoots twice with very wide spread.

pages.title: Tommy Gun
pages.description: 25 bullets, shoots with heavy spread and speed.

pages.title: Maverick 88
pages.description: Low spread pump action shotgun. Shoots 6 pellets.

pages.title: Weapon Mechanics
pages.description: Complete weapon mechanics guide: Tier 3 dual wield, Stand penalty, revolver reloads.

pages.title: Weapons FAQ
pages.description: Common questions about weapons. Tier 3 dual wield, Stand penalty, best weapons, and reload mechanics FAQ.

pages.title: Tier 3 Dual Wield System
pages.description: Cannot equip both primary and secondary weapons until tier 3. Significant progression milestone.

pages.title: Stand Penalty Mechanics
pages.description: Having a Stand decreases base gun damages. Strategic trade-off between Stand abilities and weapon effectiveness.

pages.title: Revolver Reload Mechanics
pages.description: Revolvers have wasteful reloads. Affects Taurus .357, Schofield 6, Whitney Dragoon, Colt Ocelot.

pages.title: Items & Utilities Database
pages.description: Complete items and utilities database. Consumables, throwables, special equipment, and vampire-hunting tools.

pages.title: Dogbane Herb
pages.description: Rare 4% chest drop. Trade to Mud Witch for 2500 moola, age regression (-20 years), or stand removal.

pages.title: Silver Ammo
pages.description: Applies silver damage to vampires. Silver Prodigy card spawns you with +1 silver ammo pack each life.

pages.title: Tonic
pages.description: Roblox friendly alcohol. Drink to heal HP. Too much blurs your screen until you pass out.

pages.title: Dynamite
pages.description: Throw dynamite, explodes after a delay. Outlaws throw 2 at tier 2 and 3 at tier 3.

pages.title: Molotov
pages.description: Leaves a fire pool on impact. Tossing on smoke bomb creates large explosion.

pages.title: Silver Dagger
pages.description: Chest drop. 8 base damage (double to vampires). Leaves silver fire. M2 grab and shank.

pages.title: Wooden Stake
pages.description: Emergency anti vampire solution. Stakes vampires for ~10s, burns them while embedded.

pages.title: Cowboy Hat
pages.description: Protects you from 1 headshot. Essential survival item.

pages.title: Poncho
pages.description: Less overall damage in exchange for more limb damage. Makes you look swag.

pages.title: Cards Database
pages.description: Complete Tarot Cards database. All 25 cards, effects, builds, and how to obtain at Mud Witch.

pages.title: All Cards
pages.description: Complete database of all 25 Tarot Cards. Ranged, melee, mobility, high risk builds with full effects.

pages.title: Card Builds
pages.description: Optimized 3-card combinations for different playstyles. Bow, gun, melee, and hybrid builds.

pages.title: How to Get Cards
pages.description: Complete guide to obtaining cards. Mud Witch location, 150 Moola per roll, reroll strategy.

pages.title: Archer's Child
pages.description: 1.5x drawspeed on bows. 2x firerate on bows. Best for bow builds.

pages.title: Desperado
pages.description: The lower your health is, the more damage your guns do. Does not work with bows.

pages.title: Boy With Fists
pages.description: Deal 20% more melee damage. Lose 55% gun accuracy. Best for pure melee builds.

pages.title: Belmont Family Crest
pages.description: Deal 25% more melee damage towards vampires. Take 25% more damage by humans.

pages.title: Show Me A Good Time
pages.description: 0.45s of parry frames on slash/equip. Best for sabre builds.

pages.title: A True Cowboy
pages.description: Your lasso is aimed at others while on horseback. Deal 17% more gun damage on horseback.

pages.title: Demolitions Expert
pages.description: Your explosions hurt you for less. Your explosions do more damage to others.

pages.title: Free Runner
pages.description: Gain 20 stamina. Combat roll is changed into a slide. Best for all builds.

pages.title: Poltergeist
pages.description: Almost invisible during combat roll. Roll takes 80% more stamina.

pages.title: Can't Lay Off the Tonic
pages.description: Gain more damage the more tonics you consume. Take damage overtime if you don't consume tonics.

pages.title: Flesh Automaton
pages.description: Taking lethal damage causes your body to blare out warning noises, before exploding.

pages.title: High Noon
pages.description: -10 Max Hp. When the time reaches noon, grants autoaim for 5 seconds.

pages.title: Snake Eater
pages.description: Your name and gang tag are still visible to other players.

pages.title: Quick Draw
pages.description: Upon equipping your primary weapon, enter quickdraw state for a short duration.

pages.title: Evil Eye
pages.description: Your ocular prowess lasts for 50% longer. Cooldown increased by 50%.

pages.title: EXECUTIONER
pages.description: Dealing a headshot that would do more than 40 damage will decapitate.

pages.title: Coin Roller
pages.description: Currently disabled. Not available in-game.

pages.title: Secret Technique
pages.description: Shown as a gif. No description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: Silver Prodigy
pages.description: No description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: STURDY
pages.description: No description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: Time Heals All Wounds
pages.description: No description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: Total Checkmate
pages.description: RIGHT CLICK TO USE. No description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: Twenty Meter Radius Steel
pages.description: Gif description. No text description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: Veteran
pages.description: No description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: Cards FAQ
pages.description: Common questions about cards. Mud Witch location, reroll strategy, best builds, and card mechanics FAQ.

pages.title: Winged Man
pages.description: No description available. Card is available in-game.

pages.title: Fishing Guide
pages.description: Complete fishing guide with drop rates, Arrow Shard farming (0.05%), Golden Bass hunting, and Moola farming strategies.

pages.title: Fishing FAQ
pages.description: Common fishing questions about Arrow Shards, Golden Bass, drop rates, and fishing mechanics.

pages.title: Arrow Shard Fishing
pages.description: Arrow Shards have 0.05% drop rate and guarantee a Stand when used. Cannot be stored or traded.

pages.title: Golden Bass
pages.description: Golden Bass sells for 15,000 Moola. Legendary drop with 0.05% chance.

pages.title: Mares Leg
pages.description: Mares Leg is an Epic fishing drop (2% chance). Secondary weapon with 7 bullets, faster Winchester.

pages.title: Locations Guide
pages.description: Complete guide to all NPCs and shops: Gun Store, Mud Witch, Horse Stables, Banker, Tailor, Barbershop, Blacksmith.

pages.title: Bridger Western Map
pages.description: Interactive Bridger Western world map showing all locations, NPCs, shops, and points of interest.

pages.title: Locations FAQ
pages.description: Common questions about NPCs, shops, Mud Witch services, Horse Stables, and customization costs.

pages.title: Mud Witch
pages.description: Mud Witch in Swamp offers Card rolls (150 Moola) and Dogbane Herb trades (2500 Moola, age -20 years, Stand wipe).

pages.title: Gun Store
pages.description: Gun Store in Main Town sells most guns including primary and secondary weapons.

pages.title: Horse Stables
pages.description: Horse Stables allow horse replacement. Press M to view stats: Speed, Stamina, Jump, Damage, Scale, Turn.

pages.title: Banker
pages.description: Banker provides item storage for guns, utilities, and items. NOT kept upon server wipe.

pages.title: Blacksmith
pages.description: Blacksmith (Flint) repairs rusted Mares Leg for 1500 Moola and offers Can Questline.

pages.title: Mares Leg Guide
pages.description: Complete Mares Leg guide: 2% fishing drop, 1500 Moola repair at Blacksmith, 7 bullets, faster Winchester, Tier 3 required.

pages.title: Horse Guide
pages.description: Complete horse guide: Stats (Speed, Stamina, Jump, Damage, Scale, Turn), rarities (Common to Mythical), Horse Stables locations, and horse-related content.
